final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing styled smartphone photo of Korean-cafe-style fashionable coffee and desserts, with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays in a Japanese diary-note style — no people.

Style/medium: needs a Korean café aesthetic shot on smartphone, Instagram-story / rough-magazine-note hybrid — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a flat-lay or casual tabletop framing with breathing room ("空白") between annotation zones — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include coffee drink(s) and dessert/sweets items typical of a Korean café setting (no people)
Scene/backdrop: must include a Korean café tabletop or counter surface as backdrop
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, fashionable café daylight atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs a muted, warm-toned direction consistent with Korean café aesthetics — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs the feel of a real smartphone snapshot — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays in Japanese handwriting style (7割ひらがな・3割かんじ), short diary-voice comments per element — verbatim examples by category below:
  • 飲み物 → 「やさしい甘さ♡」「ほっこり〜」「すっきり！」
  • 食べ物 → 「しっとり最高」「たまらん…」
  • 空間 → 「いい時間」「落ち着く〜」
  • 全体 → 「しあわせすぎた〜」
  Each annotation connected to its element via hand-drawn arrow or dashed line in white; outline strokes tracing object edges; decorative accents (steam wisps, sparkles ✦, small hearts ♡, tiny face emoticons) added sparingly
Constraints: must preserve "空白" (negative space) — annotations must not crowd the image; white-pen line quality must feel single-stroke, slightly uneven, hand-drawn; overall tone must stay fashionable yet casual (Instagram Stories / rough journal hybrid)
Avoid: typed or printed fonts; heavy annotation coverage that eliminates breathing room; any human figures or body parts
